name: Parmesan Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the oils in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until mixed on low to medium speed.
3. Slowly add the olive oil and salad oil in a steady stream until fully incorporated.
4. If the dressing becomes too thick after adding the oils, thin it out with up to 2 tablespoons of water.
